description_long: This is a modern, freestanding shelving unit featuring a striking zigzag or stepped design. The frame is constructed from a metallic material with a matte gray finish, while the shelves themselves are made of wood with a rich, natural grain pattern. The open sides and back provide easy access to each shelf, making it suitable for displaying books, decorative items, or urban essentials. The alternating shelf arrangement creates visual interest and maximizes usable space. The structure appears sturdy and well-balanced, with each shelf supported by the metal frame. Its contemporary style makes it ideal for urban environments such as lofts, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, zigzag shelving unit with a gray metal frame and wood-grain shelves. Its open, stepped design offers both style and practical storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the alternating, stepped arrangement of the shelves and the open structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the zigzag profile of the frame and the layered wooden shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the open back and the wood grain of the shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the stepped, geometric frame and shelf alignment.
